King Me
Developer Menu
OFF
Dev mode starts every run at level 50 with a hand of all cards, 10 copies each, and adds a Skip Level button during play. Every level cleared or skipped still shows a reward screen, offering white cards only since everything else is already in your hand.

King Me tracks your progress on a global leaderboard. Enter a name to continue — this is required, and you'll only need to do it once.
